sub_modules.aes128_decrypt_core: Combinational AES-128 inverse-round datapath using reverse round keys.
sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 key expansion producing all eleven round keys.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_sub_bytes: Combinational inverse S-box substitution for all state bytes.
sub_modules.aes128_add_round_key: Combinational state and round-key XOR stage.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_mix_columns: Combinational AES inverse MixColumns over GF(2^8).
